message:
fix(io): convert assert-based completion guards to error-returning fail-closed pattern

Replace assert!(!completed) panics with io::Error returns in Copy,
CopyBuf, CopyWithProgress, and CopyBidirectional futures so that
repolling after completion produces a diagnosable error instead of
crashing the runtime. Add regression tests for all four.

Lines stream: add `completed` field that latches on terminal events
(EOF, error, invalid UTF-8). Repolling after completion triggers a
panic via assert, consistent with stream combinator conventions. Add
regression tests for both empty-input and exhausted-input scenarios.

ReadLine future: convert assert! to io::Error return for consistency
with the other IO futures. Add repoll regression test.

browser_stream.rs (WasmReadableStreamSource): fix premature EOF
reporting when ReadableStream yields null/undefined or empty values.
Instead of returning Ready(Ok(())) which signals EOF, wake the waker
and return Pending so the caller retries. This prevents the reader
from incorrectly interpreting an in-flight chunk boundary as stream
termination.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
